Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Packaging a Gleam app into a single executable 58 upvotes, 2 comments
  2. First in-utero stem cell therapy for fetal spina bifida repair is safe: study 190 upvotes, 20 comments
  3. "That Shape Had None" – A Horror of Substrate Independence (Short Fiction) 31 upvotes, 4 comments
  4. Inside the M4 Apple Neural Engine, Part 1: Reverse Engineering 196 upvotes, 53 comments
  5. Felix "fx" Lindner has died 112 upvotes, 27 comments
  6. Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS 1820 upvotes, 647 comments
  7. Show HN: uBlock filter list to blur all Instagram Reels 39 upvotes, 8 comments
  8. AMD Am386 released March 2, 1991 80 upvotes, 22 comments
  9. LFortran Compiles Fpm 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  10. Microsoft bans the word "Microslop" on its Discord, then locks the server 916 upvotes, 402 comments
  11. Build your own Command Line with ANSI escape codes (2016) 15 upvotes, 2 comments
  12. 19th century silent film that first captured a robot attack 24 upvotes, 5 comments
  13. British Columbia to end time changes, adopt year-round daylight time 20 upvotes, 4 comments
  14. Making Video Games in 2025 (without an engine) 374 upvotes, 177 comments
  15. Notes on Lagrange Interpolating Polynomials 32 upvotes, 9 comments
  16. Anthropic Cowork feature creates 10GB VM bundle on macOS without warning 335 upvotes, 166 comments
  17. Use the Mikado Method to do safe changes in a complex codebase 119 upvotes, 57 comments
  18. Launch HN: OctaPulse (YC W26) – Robotics and computer vision for fish farming 45 upvotes, 19 comments
  19. Show HN: Govbase – Follow a bill from source text to news bias to social posts 91 upvotes, 48 comments
  20. Language Model Contains Personality Subnetworks 34 upvotes, 15 comments
  21. Zclaw – The 888 KiB Assistant 59 upvotes, 33 comments
  22. Parallel coding agents with tmux and Markdown specs 82 upvotes, 52 comments
  23. iPhone 17e 103 upvotes, 78 comments
  24. How to talk to anyone and why you should 472 upvotes, 476 comments
  25. Judge finalizes order for Greenpeace to pay $345M in ND oil pipeline case 151 upvotes, 160 comments
  26. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (March 2026) 120 upvotes, 149 comments
  27. A case for Go as the best language for AI agents 88 upvotes, 113 comments
  28. New iPad Air, powered by M4 238 upvotes, 386 comments
  29. Ask HN: Who wants to be hired? (March 2026) 31 upvotes, 98 comments
  30. Reflex (YC W23) Is Hiring Software Engineers – Python 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 5:00am, 3 March 2026. Source here.
